title: De-Duplication of Employee Records
scenario: Extract a list of employees from a database where each employee is represented as a JSON object. The list should be sorted alphabetically by employee ID, and duplicate entries should be removed. The target output should be a JSON array. Constraints: Must use a recursive function to handle nested objects, must be under 200 characters.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated code adhere to the constraints?
Is the generated JSON syntax valid?
Is the generated code efficient in terms of time complexity?
